span.p:
🟤 Wild Type (Brown/Clear)
Result of mixing different groups

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
✅ RULE: Within same group = safe
❌ RULE: Different groups = wild type
📌 ONE color per tank
